title: Login Authentication Error
description: Users are unable to login via Google OAuth on mobile devices.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: SSLCommerz timeout occurring during checkout process intermittently.

title: UI Alignment Issue in Dashboard
description: The sidebar overlaps with the main content on 13-inch screens.

title: Password Reset Email Not Sent
description: Users report not receiving the password recovery link in their inbox.

title: Slow API Response Time
description: The /api/v1/products endpoint takes more than 5 seconds to load.

title: Typo in Terms & Conditions
description: Minor spelling mistake in the third paragraph of the legal page.

title: Search Filter Not Working
description: Applying multiple category filters returns zero results incorrectly.

title: Database Migration Script Fail
description: The latest migration script failed on the staging server.

title: Mobile App Crashing on iOS
description: App crashes immediately after the splash screen on iPhone 15.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer wants a native dark mode for the web portal.

title: Invoice PDF Generation Error
description: Special characters are not rendering correctly in the PDF invoices.

title: Session Expiry Issue
description: Users are being logged out too quickly (within 5 minutes of activity).
